title: Moist Tunisian Semolina Cake
description: A traditional Tunisian cake made with semolina flour, custard powder, and render fat, this dessert is a crowd pleaser and FODMAP friendly. It features a yeasty and aerated texture that is sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together semolina flour, custard powder, and granulated sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together melted render fat, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
Add the active dry yeast and salt, and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely before serving.
